content.query:
CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = '<set locally, not stored in repo>';
GO

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL justicecreds
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';
GO

-----------CREATE EXT DATA SOURCE-----------
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE raw_ext_source
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://justicelearning.dfs.core.windows.net/demo',
    CREDENTIAL = justicecreds
)

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csv_format
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS(
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ''
    )
)
